strategies.name: HistogramFade
strategies.idea: MACD histogram inflection point — long when histogram below zero and rising, short when above zero and falling.
strategies.notes: Works across all three micro futures. Best on MES 15m (Sharpe 2.20).

strategies.name: VolumeSpikeFade
strategies.idea: Short when volume is 3x the 20-bar average on an up bar and price closes in the lower 25 percent of bar range. Long when volume is 3x the 20-bar average on a down bar and price closes in the upper 25 percent of bar range.
strategies.notes: Only confirmed on MES 15m. Blew up on MNQ 15m. Forward test MES only.
